content.en:
Where is the limit of the Endless Dao, Ye Tian can't spy on it yet, of course, this does not prevent him from improving his strength.

Even if he can't be promoted to Invincible Dao Ancestor for a long time, as long as his strength continues to improve, he can still kill Invincible Dao Ancestor, and even as long as the Forbidden Dao Technique is strong enough, the Forbidden Dao attainment is even higher, and he is even expected to be able to compete with the Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

Of course, this step is hard and difficult.

One day soon after.

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm was very calm, and the Dark Forbidden Realm was relatively peaceful, only a small area of fighting.

However, a huge black shadow floated through the Dark Forbidden Realm, and at the same time, a terrifying biological coercion was transmitted.

......

"What's that?"

Several Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors were looking for the Forbidden Zerg, and suddenly saw a huge black shadow, and felt the terrifying biological coercion, and their bodies trembled involuntarily, as if they had seen a real great terror.

They wanted to use their Divine Sense to probe the situation over there, but after the Divine Sense extended over, it was difficult to move forward, and they couldn't see what the dark shadow was.

They did not rush forward for fear of danger.

As a result, one of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors performed a Great Thousand Dao Technique-level Pupil Technique—Thousand Heavy Pupils!

Rumble!!!!

The void broke through layer by layer, and the pupil light broke through the darkness, looking directly at the unknown black shadow itself.

Finally, he saw it.

It was an incomparably huge body, like a majestic world, a wisp of breath could crush the eons, I don't know how many levels higher than the so-called primeval chaos life, as if it was a truly supreme existence.

In appearance, it was a creature similar to an eagle, but covered in black-gold scale armor that covered its entire body, and had four claws, all of which were extremely sharp.

"This ...... This is a taboo biological !!!"

This Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor was shocked.

He wasn't sure if the forbidden creature had died, if it hadn't, the three of them would have been wiped out in an instant, without the slightest chance of survival.

The legendary forbidden creatures, that are terrifying existences comparable to domain ancestors.

"Retreat!"

"Everyone, get out!"

This Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor said.

They didn't dare to retreat too fast, so as not to cause fluctuations, but slowly retreated silently, until they had retreated a far, long distance and could no longer perceive the existence of the forbidden creature, and then they accelerated and flew back to the base where they were.

-------------------

Soon, a piece of news spread across the major bases.

The news that a forbidden creature has appeared is simply shocking and terrifying to countless people.

After all, once a forbidden creature appears, they will all be killed, and there is no chance of survival.

However, Ye Tian got the most timely news.

"A fallen forbidden creature!"

Ye Tian's heart moved, revealing full interest.

The first thing that came to his mind was the forbidden talent of the forbidden creature, and once he copied the forbidden creature's talent, it would be of great help to his strength.

Secondly, what he thought of was the chance and treasure of the forbidden creatures.

Swish!

Ye Tian's copy body: The Dark King was dispatched, and he followed many of the strongest Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain to the fallen forbidden creatures.

And the half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain had already gone, and they didn't wait for Ye Tian and them at all.

After all, for a half-step domain ancestor, when it comes to the corpse of a forbidden creature, what a great opportunity this is!

If it was in the previous Divine Heaven Realm, I am afraid that even the Domain Ancestors would have to fight for it, where would it be their turn to get these half-step Domain Ancestors!

Not long after, Ye Tian also came to the place where the corpse of the forbidden creature was.

At the place where the corpse of the forbidden creature fell, there were already many Supreme Dao Ancestors, Invincible Dao Ancestors, and Half-Step Domain Ancestors gathered here.

As for the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors, they didn't dare to approach at all, because their physical bodies couldn't withstand the escaping power of forbidden creatures at all, and they had to have forbidden bodies to be able to withstand this power.

Therefore, those Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors with forbidden bodies can also approach here, but how many Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors can have forbidden bodies at the Supreme Dao Ancestor level?

Therefore, most of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors couldn't get close to here, and even if they had a chance, they wouldn't be able to get their turn.

The Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors were not qualified to approach, and the weaker Dao Ancestors were even more hopeless.

"It's really a forbidden creature!"

Ye Tian also came here as the Dark King, saw the corpse of the forbidden creature, felt the coercion of the forbidden creature, and said in surprise.

What made him even more curious was that the forbidden creature seemed to be completely intact and unharmed.

How powerful a forbidden creature is, comparable to the Domain Ancestor, if it hadn't encountered a fierce battle, how could it have fallen?

As for the lifespan, it's simply impossible!

The lifespan of forbidden creatures is almost the same as that of the Dark Forbidden Domain, the Dark Forbidden Domain is not destroyed, and the lifespan of forbidden creatures is also eternal and immortal, how can it be possible to die after a large lifespan?

"Could it be that the soul has been annihilated?"

Ye Tian guessed.

In addition, he was also curious about whether the Wind Mountain Lord of Black Wind Mountain would appear?

Even if the Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain is a legendary domain ancestor, he will be interested in the corpse of a forbidden creature, and may take away the corpse of this forbidden creature.

"If the Wind Mountain Lord had come, he would have come at his speed, but he didn't come now, could it be that he had given up? Could it be that the Wind Mountain Lord had a more important plan that could not be achieved, and even the corpse of the forbidden creature could not lure him out in advance?"

Ye Tian said curiously.

At this time, the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, Eternal Dao Ancestor, Gengjin Dao Ancestor, and the half-step domain ancestors of the other bases of the Black Wind Mountain had all arrived, and they were still studying the corpse of this forbidden creature.

"Close!"

The power of the Green Dragon Palace Lord spread to the body of this forbidden creature, trying to take away the body of this forbidden creature, but a force shook and directly shook the Green Dragon Palace Lord to the point that he was torn all over, and he was injured.

"No!" the Blue Dragon Palace Lord shook his head, "Forbidden creatures are beyond all the rules, and they can't be included in the inner world, and they can't be taken away!, unless the rules of our inner world can be comparable to the dark forbidden realm, but that's impossible!"

"Qinglong Palace Master, I have long said that I can't take it away, you don't believe it, even the domain ancestor can't take away the corpse of the forbidden creature, when he was in the Divine Heaven Realm, those domain ancestors cut the corpses of the forbidden creatures, and then constantly extracted the power of the corpses of the forbidden creatures, and only after special disposal could the body fragments of the forbidden creatures be taken away. We're not Domain Ancestors, and we really can't do anything about this forbidden creature's corpse!" said the Eternal Dao Ancestor with a smile.

Immediately, the half-step domain ancestors flew in from the huge mouth of the corpse of this forbidden creature, preparing to enter the world inside the forbidden creature to find an opportunity and snatch the treasure.

And at this time, Ye Tian also approached the corpse of this forbidden creature, and spread it with his copying talent, barely touching the corpse of this forbidden creature.

"Sure enough, there is a forbidden talent!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.
